channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal challenge examines academic freedom after University of Lethbridge cancels Frances Widdowson talk
item.description: Frances Widdowson, a former professor at Mount Royal University, is challenging the University of Lethbridge in court after her scheduled talk in February 2023 was cancelled due to protests and safety...

item.title: Metro Manila Residents Advised to Wear Masks Due to Poor Air Quality
item.description: Dahil sa lumalalang kalidad ng hangin sa Metro Manila, naglabas ng abiso ang Office of Civil Defense (OCD) na magsuot ng face mask ang mga residente kung kinakailangang lumabas ng bahay. Partikular na...

item.title: Vulnerabilities in Crosswalk Audio Systems Reveal Weak Municipal Cybersecurity
item.description: In April 2025, a hacker exploited weak security measures in crosswalk audio systems across Silicon Valley, uploading spoofed audio clips of tech CEOs like Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk. This prank, wh...

item.title: Coetzé hits Commonwealth Games qualifying mark as SA swimming championships get under way
item.description: World champion Pieter Coetzé got the South African national swimming championships off to a strong start in Gqeberha by becoming the first swimmer to achieve a qualifying time for the upcoming Commonw...

item.title: Montreal Expands REM Light-Rail Network with West Island Branch Opening
item.description: Montreal's REM (Réseau express métropolitain) light-rail system is set to expand with the opening of a new branch on May 18, improving transit access in the city’s West Island region. Known as the Ans...

item.title: Kwara Police Arrest 33 Suspects Linked to 2025 Church Attack, Recover Weapons
item.description: Police for Kwara State don arrest 33 people wey dem believe say dem get hand for November 18, 2025 attack for Christ Apostolic Church, Oke Isegun, Eruku. Na serious operation dem carry out across plac...

item.title: Man Arrested for Alleged Attack on Sam Altman’s Home and OpenAI Offices
item.description: A 20-year-old man, Daniel Moreno-Gama, has been held without bail following an alleged attack on the home of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and the company's headquarters in San Francisco. Authorities claim Mo...

item.title: IMF Urges Targeted Measures to Avoid Global Recession
item.description: The International Monetary Fund has issued a warning to the Albanese government, urging caution with untargeted cost-of-living relief measures that could exacerbate inflation. The IMF's latest global ...

item.title: U.S. stocks resilient despite higher oil prices, rising yields, and limited rate cuts
item.description: The U.S. stock market has returned to pre-conflict levels following the recent Middle East tensions, despite a very different economic backdrop. Oil prices are around 40% higher, inflation concerns ha...

item.title: Liberal by-election win in Terrebonne sparks speculation over Conservative unity and shifting Quebec politics
item.description: In this opinion column, Tasha Kheiriddin examines the broader political implications of a recent Liberal by-election victory in Terrebonne, Quebec, where Liberal candidate Tatiana Auguste secured a na...

item.title: Cotabato records extreme heat index at 46°C, PAGASA warns of danger level
item.description: Cotabato City experienced an extremely high heat index of 46 degrees Celsius on Monday, marking the highest level recorded since monitoring began in March, according to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geo...

item.title: Campaign donations and special‑interest lobbying heat up Albany budget debates
item.description: A recent Politico New York Playbook piece highlights how campaign money and lobbying by powerful interest groups are shaping key policy fights in Albany, New York’s state capital. Governor Kathy Hochu...

item.title: Former Aide Testifies OVP Disbursed P125 Million in Confidential Funds Quickly
item.description: A former aide to Vice President Sara Duterte, Ramil Madriaga, has testified before lawmakers claiming that the Office of the Vice President (OVP) disbursed its P125 million in confidential funds withi...

item.title: Balzac's character creation through social types and chance, explained via Dungeons & Dragons mechanics
item.description: The article draws an interesting parallel between the character creation system in the popular role-playing game Dungeons and Dragons and the literary techniques used by 19th-century French novelist H...

item.title: Delhi HC Temporarily Halts Demolition of Property Linked to Murder Accused in Uttam Nagar
item.description: In Delhi’s Uttam Nagar, an under-construction house linked to a man accused of killing a 26-year-old during Holi celebrations was partially demolished by the Municipal Corporation of Delhi. The civic ...

item.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4-Cyber and Updates Cybersecurity Approach
item.description: OpenAI announced its new cybersecurity strategy alongside the release of GPT-5.4-Cyber, a model designed for digital defense. The announcement comes shortly after competitor Anthropic introduced its C...

item.title: Stella issues a warning as tensions rise between her and Claudia in The Alibi Episode 20
item.description: In Episode 20 of ABS-CBN’s drama series The Alibi, the story reaches a tense turning point as Stella Morales, portrayed by Kim Chiu, warns about an unexpected and fierce move by Claudia, played by Sof...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rain and Strong Winds Across Several Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a weather advisory warning of increased rainfall and strong winds affecting several counties from the evening of April 14 to the evening of April 1...

item.title: Somalia kills 27 al-Shabaab militants in coordinated military operation
item.description: Somalia's defense ministry has confirmed the deaths of 27 al-Shabaab militants in a joint military operation, supported by air strikes, in the semi-autonomous Jubbaland state. The operation targeted m...

item.title: Why Growing Numbers of Teenagers Are Trading Stocks and What It Means for Markets
item.description: The article examines how an increasing number of teenagers are dipping into the stock market, often using custodial brokerage accounts with parental supervision and guided by social‑media investing co...
